title: Rent Hike
description: Your landlord 'renovated' the lobby. Rent is up 10%.

title: Stimulus Check
description: The government sent you a check. Don't spend it all in one place.

title: Flu Season
description: You caught the flu. Lose 20% of your time this week.

title: Car Breakdown
description: Your transmission exploded. Mechanics are expensive.

title: Gift from Grandma
description: A birthday card with cash! Thanks Nana.

title: Bad Burrito
description: That gas station burrito was a mistake. Lose 10 hours.

title: Tech Boom
description: Tech stocks are up! Your savings earned a 10% bonus.

title: Market Crash
description: The economy took a dive. Your savings lost 10%.

title: Corporate Restructuring
description: Your company is 'downsizing'. You have been laid off.

title: Performance Bonus
description: You crushed it this quarter. Here's a bonus.

title: Pickpocketed
description: Someone bumped into you on the subway. Your wallet is lighter.

title: Mental Health Day
description: You just couldn't get out of bed. Lose 10 Happiness.

title: Free Concert Tickets
description: You won tickets on the radio! Gain 15 Happiness.
